# Prompt 01 — Bootstrap Full-Stack ACH Payment Tracking Project

## Objective

Create the initial full-stack project skeleton for the ACH Payment Tracking Agent.

Read `.github/copilot-instructions.md` before generating code.

This step must create the backend, frontend, documentation, and demo-data structure only.

Do not implement ACH parsing yet.

Do not implement payment ledger logic yet.

Do not implement LLM logic yet.

Do not implement real PEP+ integration.

---

## Required Root Structure

Create this project structure:

```text
payment-tracking-agent/
  backend/
  frontend/
  demo-data/
  docs/
  .github/
    copilot-instructions.md
    prompts/
